title: Address gaps in your knowledge base with suggested topics
description: You can now quickly identify the topics that require knowledge base articles in your project with suggested topics powered by Atlassian Intelligence. This feature gives your team a headstart on knowledge articles you should be creating to deflect requests and increase self service among your customers.
